headline: Has Texas Pacific Land (TPL) Run Too Far After Its Strong Year To Date Rally?
summary: Wondering whether Texas Pacific Land's current share price lines up with its underlying worth, or if the recent volatility is sending a misleading signal. The stock closed at US$386.61, with the share price down 4.0% over the past week and 8.5% over the past month, while still up 29.7% year to date, but down 17.8% over the last year and up 163.5% over three years and 145.3% over five years. Those mixed returns have kept Texas Pacific Land on many investors' watchlists, especially as broader...
